skill-health-effect-minus-10-description: Subtracts 10 points from your maximum health
skill-health-effect-minus-15-description: Subtracts 20 points from your maximum health
skill-health-effect-minus-20-description: Subtracts 30 points from your maximum health
skill-all-res-effect-10-description: Adds 3 points to all element resistances
skill-all-res-effect-15-description: Adds 5 points to all element resistances
skill-all-res-effect-20-description: Adds 10 points to all element resistances
skill-all-res-effect-minus-10-descriptio: Subtracts 3 points from all element resistances
skill-all-res-effect-minus-15-descriptio: Subtracts 5 points from all element resistances
skill-all-res-effect-minus-20-descriptio: Subtracts 10 points from all element resistances
skill-resist-sts-effect-10-description: Provides immunity to all abnormal status effects
skill-anti-fire-drg-effect-10-descriptio: Provides higher resistance to fire-based elemental damage and cancels damage from lava or Teostra/Lunastra's aura
skill-anti-daora-effect-10-description: Provides immunity to Snowman and Wind Press status
skill-anti-chamel-effect-10-description: Provides immunity to all status ailments given by Chameleos, including poison, stealing, and fatigue
skill-artisan-effect-10-description: Increases maximum sharpness by one level
skill-sharpness-effect-10-description: Decreases sharpness lost on weapon by half
skill-sharpness-effect-minus-10-descript: Increases sharpness lost on weapon by x2
skill-guard-effect-10-description: Block requires less stamina, and hunter receives less damage and push back
skill-guard-effect-20-description: Block requires even less stamina, and hunter receives even less damage and push back
skill-guard-effect-minus-10-description: Block requires more stamina, and hunter receives more damage and push back
skill-auto-guard-effect-10-description: Automatically blocks attacks if the weapon permits
skill-sword-draw-effect-10-description: Unsheathing attacks have a 100% chance to be critical hits
skill-normal-s-up-effect-10-description: Increases damage of Normal S shots and Rapid bow shots by 10%
skill-pierce-s-up-effect-10-description: Increases damage of Pierce S shots and Pierce bow shots by 10%
skill-pellet-s-up-effect-10-description: Increases damage of Pellet S shots and Scatter bow shots by 10%
skill-normal-s-add-effect-20-description: Normal LV1, LV2, and LV3 are enabled
skill-pierce-s-add-effect-15-description: Pierce LV1, LV2, and LV3 are enabled
skill-pellet-s-add-effect-15-description: Pellet LV1, LV2, and LV3 are enabled
skill-crag-s-add-effect-15-description: Crag LV1, LV2, and LV3 are enabled
skill-clust-s-add-effect-15-description: Clust LV1, LV2, and LV3 are enabled
skill-auto-reload-effect-10-description: Current ammo fires without reloading, except rapid-fire ammo; bow coatings apply automatically
skill-steady-hand-effect-10-description: Grants shot-type damage boosts for normal/rapid, pierce, and pellet/scatter shots
skill-spc-attack-effect-10-description: Increases weapon poison, paralysis, and sleep values by x1.125
skill-element-atk-effect-10-description: Increases fire, water, ice, thunder, and dragon elemental damage by x1.2
skill-rec-speed-effect-10-description: Red portion of health recovers 2x faster
skill-rec-speed-effect-20-description: Red portion of health recovers 4x faster
skill-rec-speed-effect-minus-10-descript: Red portion of health recovers 2x slower
skill-protection-effect-10-description: 20% chance of receiving 30% less damage when taking damage
skill-protection-effect-minus-10-descrip: 20% chance of receiving 30% more damage when taking damage
skill-guard-up-effect-10-description: Enables blocking attacks that normally cannot be blocked
skill-evade-effect-10-description: Slightly increases invincibility time during rolling and diving
skill-evade-effect-15-description: Greatly increases invincibility time during rolling and diving
skill-evade-dist-effect-10-description: Increases covered distance when dodge rolling and diving
skill-potential-effect-15-description: +90 defense and +30% attack when health is below 40%
skill-potential-effect-minus-10-descript: Increases defense but cuts attack by 30% when health is below 40%
skill-gunnery-effect-10-description: Increases damage of Ballista S and Cannon S
skill-gunnery-effect-15-description: Increases damage of Ballista S, Cannon S, Gunlance shells, Wyvern's Fire, and Crag S
skill-capacity-effect-10-description: Adds a Gunlance shell, adds ammo capacity to bowgun ammo types, or adds one bow charge level up to level 4
skill-short-charg-effect-10-description: Decreases charging time and increases Long Sword spirit gauge gain
skill-short-charg-effect-minus-10-descri: Increases charging time and decreases Long Sword spirit gauge gain
skill-guts-effect-10-description: Saves the hunter from an instant-death hit when health is above 65
skill-fury-effect-10-description: Saves the hunter from deadly hits and increases damage during low health
skill-map-effect-10-description: See the entire map without the map item
skill-map-effect-minus-10-description: Cannot see the map even with the map item
skill-psychic-vis-effect-10-description: Provides detailed information on painted monsters, including calm or angry state
skill-psychic-vis-effect-15-description: Constantly shows large monster locations and activity state on the map
skill-carving-effect-10-description: Carving won't be interrupted by small attacks
skill-carving-effect-20-description: Can carve one extra time off any carving
skill-hi-spd-gathr-effect-10-description: Increases the speed of carving, mining, gathering, and bugnetting
skill-backpackng-effect-10-description: Increases movement speed when carrying eggs and lets you fall farther without breaking them
skill-whim-effect-15-description: Prevents Pickaxes, Bugnets, and Flutes from breaking 25% of the time
skill-whim-effect-20-description: Prevents Pickaxes, Bugnets, and Flutes from breaking 50% of the time
skill-whim-effect-minus-10-description: Doubles chance of Pickaxes, Bugnets, and Flutes breaking 25% of the time
skill-whim-effect-minus-15-description: Doubles chance of Pickaxes, Bugnets, and Flutes breaking 50% of the time
skill-fishing-effect-10-description: Increases the time to hook fish when the bait is eaten
skill-heat-res-effect-10-description: Immunity to heat at specific areas
skill-heat-res-effect-minus-10-descripti: Health decreases x1.5 faster in hot areas
skill-cold-res-effect-10-description: Immunity to cold at specific areas
skill-cold-res-effect-minus-10-descripti: Stamina bar decreases x1.5 faster in cold areas
skill-constitutn-effect-10-description: Stamina used to roll or dive is halved
skill-constitutn-effect-15-description: Stamina used to roll or dive is greatly reduced
skill-sneak-effect-10-description: Monsters target the hunter less often than teammates
skill-sneak-effect-minus-10-description: Monsters target the hunter more often than teammates
skill-speed-setup-effect-10-description: Guarantees trap combinations succeed, and speeds up trap and bomb-setting time
skill-tranquilzr-effect-10-description: Sometimes increases the chance of more capture rewards
skill-tranquilzr-effect-15-description: Often increases the chance of more capture rewards
skill-perceive-effect-10-description: Painted or auto-tracked capture targets turn yellow when they are ready to be captured
skill-everlastng-effect-minus-10-descrip: Item effect duration is cut by 40%
skill-throw-effect-10-description: Increases thrown item distance and reduces the chance of boomerangs breaking
skill-bomb-str-up-effect-10-description: Guarantees bomb combinations succeed and increases bomb damage by x1.5
skill-gluttony-effect-10-description: Can get a stamina increase from fish steaks
skill-gluttony-effect-15-description: Can get a stamina increase from healing items
skill-bbq-effect-10-description: Makes it easier to cook Well-Done Steaks and possible to cook Gourmet Steaks
skill-bbq-effect-minus-10-description: Makes it hard to cook steaks
skill-horn-effect-10-description: Halves the chance for flute items to break and extends Hunting Horn song duration by 1 minute
skill-shot-mix-effect-10-description: Maxes out the amount of ammo or coatings made by each combination
skill-alchemy-effect-10-description: Enables combinations for items that require Alchemy
skill-comrd-guide-effect-10-description: Increases Felyne Comrade experience after clearing quests
skill-comrd-guide-effect-15-description: Increases Felyne Comrade experience and skill points after clearing quests
